name: Special Refund of Excess Social Security Tax

eligibility.description: Applies to individuals whose combined wages from two or more employers exceed the Social Security wage base for the calendar year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows employees who worked for more than one employer to claim a credit or refund for Social Security taxes (FICA) withheld on total wages exceeding the annual contribution base.
